meaning: n.[宗]三藏(佛教典籍的总称,义近"全书")
examples: The southern school used different texts in their 'Tripitaka.
Jason Tripitikas' last name is derived from Tripitaka, the monk whom Sun Wukong, the Monkey King, accompanied in "Journey To The West".
The third part is a general introduction and the appraisal to the autor of "Verses Delineating the Eight Consciousnesses": Tripitaka Master Hsuan-Tsang.
